text:
Cognitive Shield: AI Defense for Financial Fraud
Layer 1: Data Trust & Secure Foundations
- Privacy-first ingestion, verified identities
Layer 2: Real-Time Fraud Detection
- Deep learning, graph AI, secure LLMs stop fraud before it spreads
- 8 specialized modules covering everything from deepfakes to crypto
Layer 3: Intelligence Hub for Response & Compliance
- Smart alerts, visual dashboards, and compliance-ready reporting
Key Takeaways
- AI is not optional - it's the core of modern fraud defense
- Tables > Graphs - relationships expose hidden threats
- Multi-agent LLMs bring context, speed, and transparency
Why We Must Act Now
By 2027, if we do nothing:
- 90% of cyberattacks will be AI-driven
- $100B+ in fraud losses expected annually
Our Mission: Stop Fraud Before it Starts.
